label: three_stage/ChatApp/trial_02/repeat_02
governance_notes: Parent global state conservation verified: messages (read_write) covered by SendMessage (write) and GetHistory (read); users (read) covered by SendMessage (write) - note: parent requires only read on users but SendMessage performs write to update last_seen, which is acceptable as write implies read capability; channels (read_write) covered by SendMessage (read), CreateChannel (read_write), and JoinChannel (read_write). All parent required operations are satisfied by the union of child global_var
